steps.observed: Login form displayed with Email, Password fields and Sign In button

issues: Better-Auth config is missing emailAndPassword: { enabled: true } in apps/web/src/lib/auth.ts. The API returns HTTP 400 with EMAIL_PASSWORD_DISABLED. UI shows 'Invalid email or password' error message.

steps.observed: Login failed due to EMAIL_PASSWORD_DISABLED - cannot access authenticated dashboard

steps.expected: Login succeeds, then navigate between dashboard pages to verify session persistence
steps.observed: Login failed due to EMAIL_PASSWORD_DISABLED - cannot establish session

issues: Cannot test session persistence because login is blocked. Better-Auth emailAndPassword is not enabled.

blockers.description: Better-Auth config in apps/web/src/lib/auth.ts is missing emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }. All auth API endpoints (sign-in, sign-up) return HTTP 400 with code EMAIL_PASSWORD_DISABLED. This blocks all assertions requiring authentication.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified via curl (POST /api/auth/sign-in/email -> 400) and browser (form submission shows 'Invalid email or password'). Confirmed emailAndPassword grep returns no matches in auth.ts. Not permitted to modify source files.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-SHELL-008 protected route redirect, VAL-SHELL-015 loading states), 5 blocked (VAL-SHELL-006, VAL-SHELL-009, VAL-SHELL-013, VAL-CROSS-003, VAL-CROSS-005 — all blocked by Better-Auth emailAndPassword not being enabled).
